description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden fixed stock and foregrip, paired with a matte black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The stock and grip are made from a medium-brown wood, showing subtle grain patterns and a slightly worn finish, suggesting frequent handling. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark, matte-finished metal, with visible iron sights mounted on top. A detachable curved box magazine is fitted below the receiver, made of black metal or polymer. The trigger guard, trigger, and safety lever are all visible, with the trigger assembly integrated into the lower receiver. The overall build is robust and utilitarian, suitable for practical use in urban environments.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden fixed stock, matte black metal receiver and barrel, and a detachable curved box magazine. The design is robust and utilitarian, with visible iron sights and a worn wood finish.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing a thin profile with the barrel and stock aligned, and the front sight post visible.
description_view_1: The left side of the rifle displays the full wooden stock, curved magazine, trigger assembly, and iron sights along the barrel.
description_view_2: Viewed from the buttstock end, the rifle appears as a narrow silhouette, with the stock and barrel in line and the rear sight slightly visible.
description_view_3: The right side of the rifle reveals the wooden stock, curved magazine, trigger, and the iron sights, mirroring the left side but with subtle differences in the wood grain and receiver details.
